creator: grasr71@gmail.com
text:
In some cases portupgrade fail to retrieve dependencies. I think is due to the number or to some dependence.
The portupgrade or portinstall session will end like this:

/usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:257:in `merge': value must be enumerable (ArgumentError)
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:838:in `get_all_depends'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each_key'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:837:in `get_all_depends'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:838:in `get_all_depends'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each_key'
         ... 25 levels...
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/optparse.rb:785:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:221:in `new'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:221:in `main'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2175

I got the problem installing phpMyAdmin (above) or expect (below):
--->  Session started at: Mon, 27 Aug 2007 15:32:03 +0200
[Gathering depends for lang/expect .--->  Session ended at: Mon, 27 Aug 2007 15:32:04 +0200 (consumed 00:00:01)
/usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:257:in `merge': value must be enumerable (ArgumentError)
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:838:in `get_all_depends'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each_key'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/set.rb:189:in `each'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:837:in `get_all_depends'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:856:in `get_uninstalled_depends'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:694:in `main'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:667:in `each'
         ... 10 levels...
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/optparse.rb:785:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:221:in `new'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:221:in `main'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2175


The common R-deps are (both B-deps and R-deps for expect):
inputproto-1.3.2
kbproto-1.0.3
libX11-1.1.2_1,1
libXau-1.0.3_2
libXdmcp-1.0.2
pkg-config-0.22
xproto-7.0.10
xtrans-1.0.3

How-To-Repeat: Trying to instal phpMyAdmin or expect with "portinstall" or "portupgrade -N".
Other packages with the same problem are unknown to me at this moment.
